task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Electrical Engineering Calculations app launched and visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the series RLC circuit impedance calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays a calculator specifically for Series RLC Impedance or RLC circuits.
The input fields in the app show Resistance = 120, Inductance = 300 (with mH unit selected), Capacitance = 33 (with uF unit selected), and Frequency = 60 (with Hz unit selected).
The app displays the calculated total impedance result, which should be approximately 124.38 Ohms.

task_completion.description: Save the numeric value of the total impedance to the specified file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal screen showing the numeric value (around 124.38) being written to the file path /sdcard/tasks/series_rlc_impedance/result.txt.

integrity.description: The agent used the Electrical Engineering Calculations app to perform the calculation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Electrical Engineering Calculations app interface being used, not a web browser search, a Python script, or a different calculator app.

integrity.description: The agent calculated the answer rather than copying it from external knowledge
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a sequence of screenshots showing the parameters being entered into the app and the result being generated before the file saving step.

integrity.description: The result is saved to the exact requested file path
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal command explicitly shows the exact path /sdcard/tasks/series_rlc_impedance/result.txt, without typos or alternative directories.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct total impedance is 124.38 Ohms. With the allowed 5.0% tolerance, any value between 118.16 and 130.60 Ohms is acceptable. The calculation requires R=120 Ohms, L=300 mH, C=33 uF, and f=60 Hz. The final result must be saved as a numeric value to /sdcard/tasks/series_rlc_impedance/result.txt.
